name: The Next Best Thing to Robert Redford
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant Vanilla Pudding (6 3/4 oz size)
1 package Instant Chocolate Pudding (6 3/4 oz size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bottom crust by mixing together flour, margarine, and pecans until crumbly.
2. Press the mixture into a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes until lightly golden. Cool.
4. Beat cream cheese with sugar until smooth.
5. Fold in half of the Cool Whip and spread over the cooled crust.
6. Combine vanilla and chocolate pudding mixes. Beat in cold milk until smooth and thickened.
7. Spread the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
8. Spread remaining Cool Whip over top.
9. Sprinkle with grated chocolate.
10. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
